---
title: "Acuity"
subtitle: "Opinionated Quarto template inspired by Edward Tufte's principles"
author: "Ruslan Basyrov"
format: 
  acuity-typst:
    keep-typ: true
---


## Semantic Color Testing

This section tests how Quarto maps semantic colors from `_brand.yaml` to standard document elements like callouts.

::: {.callout-note}
**Info Color:** cyan / `#88CCEE`.
:::

::: {.callout-tip}
**Success Color:** green / `#117733`.
:::

::: {.callout-warning}
**Warning Color:** sand / `#DDCC77`.
:::

::: {.callout-important}
**Danger Color:** wine / `#882255`.
:::


## Raw Palette Swatches

[Paul Tol's color palette](https://sronpersonalpages.nl/~pault/):

```{=typst}
#let swatch(hex, name, text-color: white) = block(
  fill: rgb(hex), 
  width: 100%, 
  height: 2.5em, 
  radius: 4pt,
  align(center + horizon)[#text(fill: text-color, weight: "bold", font: "Roboto")[#name]]
)

#grid(
  columns: (1fr, 1fr, 1fr),
  gutter: 10pt,
  swatch("#CC6677", "Rose (Secondary)"),
  swatch("#332288", "Blue (Primary)"),
  swatch("#DDCC77", "Sand (Warning)", text-color: black),
  swatch("#117733", "Green (Success)"),
  swatch("#88CCEE", "Cyan (Info)", text-color: black),
  swatch("#882255", "Wine (Danger)"),
  swatch("#44AA99", "Teal"),
  swatch("#999933", "Olive"),
  swatch("#AA4499", "Purple"),
  swatch("#DDDDDD", "Gray (Bad Data)", text-color: black)
)
```

{{< lipsum 1 >}}
